title: レッスン☆サバイバル生活

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I head over to the school kitchen to make myself
some food, but when I get there...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Now, let's get started! Are you ready?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Yes, ma'am! I'm ready for instructions!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Today's theme is... "Surviving for a Week on
Limited Rations"!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
So the school's surrounded by zombies and we
have a limited amount of food... And we have to
figure out a way to survive the ordeal?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
This is all so thrilling! As a princess, I must learn to
thrive with grace in any and all situations!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I guess they're playing make-believe? But I must
say, the premise of a zombie siege sounds pretty
fun.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
First off, we'll be heading to the school fields to
find ingredients!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oh my! I wasn't expecting to have to leave the
building and venture outside so soon. This must
be quite the emergency situation.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Well, we need food to live. So if we get hungry,
then that's an emergency situation right there!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Such sound reasoning! Very well. Leave this to
me.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
A princess must be prepared to send zombie
rapscallions flying with a firm sucker punch!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Hey Trainer, great timing! So, um, we need you to
be a zombie!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oh! How exciting. So a lone zombie has managed
to infiltrate the academy... Please, do get after
us!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! Don't worry! We won't rough you up or
anything, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Okay, let's go! Come on, try and get us!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before I know what's what, I'm cast as a zombie. I
guess I should start chasing after them...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: I grew all the vegetables from over here to over there, so you can go ahead and harvest them! ♪

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
They're all so fresh and plump! I almost want to
bite right into one.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: They are tasty raw, but now is the time for restraint. ☆ Come on, let's harvest them!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They're both completely absorbed in their
harvesting. And I'm about to keel over from
sprinting the whole way.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: As the zombie, what should I do now?
choice_data_list: Put on a good show and chase them.
Make a flashy and formidable entrance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Groaning like the zombies I've seen in video
games, I sprint toward them.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Eeeeek! Y-you scared me! Wait. You caught up with us already?! That's amazing, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Stand back, Akebono! That's not your trainer,
that's a zombie! Take this, foul beast!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! You can't just shove tomatoes in people's
mouths like that, Kawakami! Are you okay,
Trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! ☆ Looks like our zombie's hungry, too. All
right, go ahead and eat your fill!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
The other veggies are yummy too. I'm sure they'll
satisfy even our zombie's appetite!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Wait, no! Our food supplies are limited,
remember?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that's right! But it's cruel to leave a zombie
with an empty tummy!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
We have to face reality, no matter how harsh it
may be! Now, let's punch its lights out—ah, I
mean, let's flee while it's munching away!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Right! I'm so sorry, but... goodbye, zombie!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two disappear into the distance. I try chasing
them with my arms stretched out in the classic
zombie pose, but end up alone in the field.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Still, it looks like this high-stakes situation was a
learning experience for Hishi Akebono, so I'll call
this a win.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Instead of acting like a sluggish, stereotypical
zombie, I make a grand entrance by jumping out
at them both.
choice_data_list: I've found you now, fresh meat!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Huh?! I thought you were supposed to be a zombie, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
But you're here acting all lively and energetic!
Wait, did you get brought back to life?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
No, you mustn't let your guard down! That must
be a super zombie! In other words, it's been
powered up!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
What?! But how did it get powered up?! Did it eat
a bunch of food or something?!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Wait, are you saying it got stronger by eating my food?! Wow! What kind of food was that?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Don't! You mustn't approach it on your own!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
There's only one option left for us now! Akebono,
combine your strength with mine so we can
immobilize this zombie!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Nnngh, okay! Let's catch it! And grill it! About
what it ate!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
No lousy zombie's going to get the better of me!
I'll show you my chanko power!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Take this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono lifts me like I weigh nothing at all,
and the two giggling students seal their victory
over me, the pitiful zombie.
